title: Bihar to roll out AI policy soon: Samrat
description: Patna, May 23 (PTI) Chief Minister Samrat Choudhary on Saturday said his government would soon roll out an artificial intelligence (AI) policy as part of its plan to develop Bihar as a major AI hub. Speaking at the inauguration of the ‘Bihar AI Summit 2026’ at Urja Auditorium in Patna, Choudhary said AI would play […]
